title: cynodon dactylon var. stellatus
intro: Cynodon dactylon var. stellatus, also known as star grass, is a variant of the popular medicinal grass Cynodon dactylon. It is a perennial grass with stellate leaves, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its various health benefits such as wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion to create remedies, and it can also be powdered and used as a supplement or added to ointments and creams for topical application.
